mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '정상' THEN 1 END), 0) as used_count, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '미사용' THEN 1 END), 0) as unused_count, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '비효율' THEN 1 END), 0) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg hi INNER JOIN database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}

SELECT hi.index_name, hi.total_idx_scan as idx_scan FROM hot_index_agg hi INNER JOIN database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY hi.total_idx_scan DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT hi.index_name, (100 - hi.avg_idx_efficiency) as inefficiency_score FROM hot_index_agg hi INNER JOIN database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hi.status = '비효율' ORDER BY inefficiency_score DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT hi.index_name, hi.total_idx_scan as idx_scan, hi.avg_idx_efficiency as efficiency FROM hot_index_agg hi INNER JOIN database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(hi.avg_idx_hit_ratio), 0) as cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(AVG(hi.avg_scan_time_ms), 0) as avg_scan_speed, COALESCE(SUM(hi.total_idx_tup_read), 0) as total_reads, COALESCE(SUM(hi.total_idx_tup_fetch), 0) as total_writes, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '비효율' THEN 1 END), 0) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg hi INNER JOIN database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}
